title: Restrict users from inviting guests
excerpt: Is there a way to restrict users from inviting guests?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to restrict users from inviting guests?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jim,

Yes this is possible on our Enterprise plan via the Admin settings!

More details here → https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005319589-Restrict-who-can-join-your-account#restricting_guest_email_domains
